row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a curved road path with slight rightward drift.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Red boxes indicate static or slow-moving objects on the left and right; blue lines suggest lane boundaries curving to the right.

semantic.scene_summary: A daytime driving scene approaching an underpass or covered walkway. The environment includes a multi-lane road, concrete walls, trees, and a modern building with orange and grey cladding on the right.
key_objects: Orange fire hydrant on the right curb
semantic.visibility_notes: Clear visibility of all elements. No occlusions affecting critical traffic features.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward motion consistent with vehicle travel. Objects maintain relative positions without sudden jumps.
logical.object_continuity: Pedestrians remain visible throughout frames. Road markings and structures transition naturally as camera moves forward.
logical.structure_continuity: Building geometry, wall alignment, and overhead structure remain stable and coherent across frames.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily toward the underpass area.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards detected. Pedestrians are on sidewalk, no crossing behavior observed. Speed appears moderate.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar layout to Row 1 but with noticeable degradation in detail clarity. Building textures appear smeared, pedestrian figures are less defined, and road markings show distortion.
semantic.visibility_notes: Significant blurring and loss of fine detail. Some elements (e.g., pedestrians) are barely recognizable due to artifacting.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Forward motion is present but exhibits minor flickering and warping artifacts, especially around edges of buildings and road surfaces.
logical.object_continuity: Pedestrian shapes persist but deform slightly between frames. Distant vehicle remains visible but loses definition over time.
logical.structure_continuity: Building facade shows texture smearing and slight geometric instability. Overhead structure maintains general form but lacks sharpness.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward, though visual noise may obscure precise trajectory interpretation.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene readability due to artifacts could impair downstream decision-making if used for real-time control. No explicit risky interaction visible.

preserved_elements: Presence of pedestrians and distant vehicles
missing_or_weakened_elements: Definition of small objects like fire hydrant
artifacts_or_instabilities: Loss of edge definition in moving objects
